name: Invasion
collationMethod: US: sequential collation, 10x11 sheets, four common runs (A/B 30 cards, C/D 25 cards)

draft.notes: Pack order: 11 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare. Foil appears at end of pack displacing same rarity. Foil basic lands displace a common; non-foil basic lands otherwise do not appear in booster packs.

sourceNotes: Large set; also has four variations of each basic land. Printed in English in the USA; Belgian English printing existence unknown. Booster commons: 6 from runs A/B + 5 from runs C/D. Tournament packs (30 lands, 3 rares, 10 uncommons, 32 commons) documented but not modelled. Foil 1:100 cards. 36 packs per box.
